subcodes.first_line: O flame enkindled by the light of the love of God! There are souls that are even as the lamp-bearing tree, the resinous wood, and the luminous plant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شعله افروخته بنور محبت الله نفوسی بمثابه شجره سراج و عود قطران و درخت چراغ
subcodes.subjects: @development of capacity and readiness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @differences in human capacity, @love of God, @spiritual transformation, @love as fire
